title: Cronos Group Reports 2024 Third Quarter Results
text: Cronos Group reported Q3 2024 net revenue of $34.3 million, representing 38% year-over-year increase. The nine-month figure totaled $87.3 million, up 38% from prior year period. Q3 net income reached $7.3 million compared to $1.6 million loss in Q3 2023. Nine-month net loss was $3.9 million, showing improvement from $25.3 million loss in 2023. Adjusted gross profit increased 170% to $10.7 million in Q3 with adjusted gross margin expanding to 31% from 16% year-over-year. Adjusted EBITDA improved by $9.2 million to negative $6.0 million. Cash and equivalents reached $862 million, up from $571.7 million a year ago. Total assets were $1.18 billion with current liabilities of $39.6 million. Spinach achieved number one market share in Canada's adult-use cannabis market for the period, demonstrating strong competitive positioning across multiple product categories. The company consolidated Cronos Growing Company results starting July 1, 2024, contributing $4.3 million in Q3 cannabis flower sales.
